title: Emergence of an antiferromagnetic topological Anderson insulator in the interacting Haldane model
title_zh: 相互作用 Haldane 模型中的反铁磁拓扑安德森绝缘体
summary: 无序与相互作用可诱导反铁磁拓扑 Anderson 相。

title: NAS-PINNv2: Improved neural architecture search framework for physics-informed neural networks in low-temperature plasma simulation
title_zh: 用于低温等离子体模拟的改进 PINN 架构搜索
summary: NAS-PINNv2 自动优化低温等离子体 PINN 结构。

title: AtomComposer: Discovering Chemical Space from First Principles with Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 用强化学习从第一性原理发现化学空间
summary: 无训练数据的强化学习直接搜索稳定分子。

title: Hybrid Classical-Quantum Neural Networks for Multi-Characteristic Co-Optimization of Recessed-Gate AlGaN/GaN MIS-HEMTs
title_zh: 凹栅 AlGaN/GaN 晶体管的混合量子神经优化
summary: 混合量子神经网络优化 AlGaN/GaN MIS-HEMT 多特性。

title: Machine-learning-accelerated discovery of synthesizable high-temperature altermagnets with giant spin splitting
title_zh: 机器学习发现可合成高温巨自旋劈裂反常磁体
summary: 机器学习锁定高温巨自旋劈裂反常磁体候选。

title: Quantum Machine Learning-based 6G edge Network: Enabling Adaptive Communication and Model Aggregation
title_zh: 量子机器学习驱动的 6G 边缘网络
summary: 量子机器学习用于 6G 车联网通信与模型聚合。

title: When do complex-valued neural networks help? A study of representation, geometry, and optimization
title_zh: 复值神经网络何时有用
summary: 复值网络收益取决于标签的相位几何结构。

title: Machine Learning-Assisted Study of Lanthanum Doping Effects on Structure, Morphology, and Flux Pinning in FeSe₀.₅Te₀.₅ Single Crystals
title_zh: La 掺杂 FeSe0.5Te0.5 的结构与磁通钉扎
summary: La 掺杂收缩 c 轴但几乎不改变 FeSeTe 的 Tc。
